TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kasuga, title = Kasuga, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kasuga} }

S.FORM: alang Kasuga ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Haruhi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 342 buwan, 1,125 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 1,098 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Amis 1%, Bunun 0.5%, Rukay 0.5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Kasuga hya' ga Kuabar. tay 'llaw na Kasuga hya' ga Seveng. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu

alang Kasuga ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Haruhi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 342 buwan, 1,125 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 1,098 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Amis 1%, Bunun 0.5%, Rukay 0.5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Kasuga hya' ga Kuabar. tay 'llaw na Kasuga hya' ga Seveng. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu
S.PHON: alaŋ kas~ɕuɣa ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu ħaruħi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *.*%, rukaj *.*%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na kas~ɕuɣa ħjaʔ ɣa kuaβar. taj ʔllaw na kas~ɕuɣa ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕe*eŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu
